property.name: include
property.value: Map:Common Data

property.name: name
property.value: Castle Town (Chapter 4 start)

property.name: description
property.value: Sells [[item]]s to the [[party]]. Also accepts the [[Knight]]'s [[Shadow Crystal]] if they received it.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]]'s home. [[Kris]], [[Susie]], [[Lancer]], [[Queen]], and [[Tenna]] have individual rooms, while [[King]] is imprisoned in the basement.

property.name: page
property.value: Ralsei's castle

property.name: description
property.value: A restaurant where the [[party]] can fuse their [[item]]s and obtain a [[Spin Cake]].

property.name: page
property.value: Top Bakery

property.name: description
property.value: The Cat Cafe. Allows the party to place their current [[recruit]]s at each table.

property.name: description
property.value: The Newly-rebranded Love Dojo. Allows the [[party]] to battle lovers.

property.name: page
property.value: Party Dojo

property.name: description
property.value: A building that allows the [[party]] to replay the [[Rock Video]] minigame and access [[Mike's room]].

property.name: page
property.value: TV Studio

properties.property: Mama Miba! Welcome to TOP Bakery! Our special chefs spin baked goods at the TOP of their class!

property.name: description
property.value: Contains topics regarding [[recruit]]s, [[item]] storage, and the game's [[Config#Controls|controls]].

property.name: description
property.value: ''2F : LIVING QUARTERS''

property.name: description
property.value: BF : LIVING QUARTERS FOR BAD GUYS

properties.property: '''Incomplete recruits:''' Once again you find yourself in a familiar town. You are filled with the power of conspicuously normal music. '''Complete recruits:''' Funky music emerges from the cafe and fills the town. You are filled with the power of funky town.

property.name: description
property.value: Ralsei greets [[Kris]] and [[Susie]] with a group hug. Susie explains the current situation regarding the [[Knight]] and [[Undyne]] to Ralsei, and Ralsei reassures Susie.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] and [[Kris]] enter their rooms and notice that they have merged. [[Ralsei]] offers a tea partywith cake to the [[party]], and the three reminisce about their adventure.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] attempts to prevent [[Susie]] from seeing the state of his room. When Susie sees how empty it is, she resolves to find furniture for him. Ralsei asks [[Kris]] if [[Darkner]]s like him should have feelings of their own since he believes that he does not deserve his own room.

property.name: description
property.value: Malius offers to [[fuse]] certain [[items]] together to make new ones.

property.name: description
property.value: Is playing a children's game using a modified controller.

property.name: description
property.value: Is attempting to scam [[Hacker]] using a children's game.

property.name: description
property.value: Is eating a leaf.

property.name: description
property.value: Makes saxophone noises when interacted with.

property.name: description
property.value: Is practicing fanning out of servitude to [[Queen]].

property.name: description
property.value: Is instructing the Fan Club members on proper fanning tehnique.

property.name: description
property.value: Randomly-colored Addisons advertise various products.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] compliments [[Ralsei]]'s outfit, while Ralsei protests.

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on being well-rounded due to being supported by friends.

property.name: page
property.value: Little ball

property.name: description
property.value: Explains that they have been training too hard, to the point where their legs have gained independence.

property.name: description
property.value: Reacts to [[Kris]]'s presence.

property.name: description
property.value: Commends the [[party]] for recruiting all possible [[Darkner]]s.

property.name: description
property.value: Stands on top of the ramparts. When approaching him, he jumps on top of [[Susie]]'s back and travels with the [[party]] throughout the town square.

property.name: description
property.value: Explains the state of the town due to the [[party]]'s previous actions.

property.name: description
property.value: Expresses annoyance of the [[Rudinn Ranger]] chatting up the [[Watercooler]].

property.name: description
property.value: The narration states that it seems agitated.

property.name: description
property.value: Compliments the water from the [[Watercooler]].

property.name: page
property.value: Rudinn Ranger

property.name: description
property.value: Is supporting the [[Zapper]] next to it.

property.name: description
property.value: Criticizes the [[Swatchling]] and calls for his retirement.

property.name: description
property.value: Criticizes the [[Zapper]] and calls for his retirement.

property.name: description
property.value: Is cheering on the [[Swatchling]] next to it.

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on the Cafe having become a "Cat Cafe".

property.name: description
property.value: Offers information about "LOVE's".

property.name: page
property.value: Love Master

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on how the [[party]] met the other Pippins.

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on [[Cap'n]]'s song playing in the background.

property.name: description
property.value: Explains that they have replaced the song playing in the Dojo.

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on the difficulty of the new dojo style and states that it may take years to master their "lovely" formation.

property.name: description
property.value: Explains that it is doing a wildlife fashion shoot and offers to take a picture of the [[party]].

property.name: description
property.value: Makes squeaking noises when interacted with

property.name: description
property.value: Makes squeaking noises when interacted with.

property.name: page
property.value: C. Round

property.name: description
property.value: Makes electronic noises when interacted with.

property.name: description
property.value: Makes meowing noises when interacted with.

property.name: description
property.value: Is sleeping in front of the jails. The narration states that it is doing "an absolutely reprehensible job" of protecting the jail.

property.name: page
property.value: C. Round

property.name: description
property.value: Expresses their desire of leaving with the rest of the escaped prisoners.

property.name: page
property.value: Goulden Sam

property.name: description
property.value: Remains behind bars despite everyone else leaving.

property.name: page
property.value: Former Kings

property.name: description
property.value: Explains that the kings and animals left to seek fortune.

property.name: page
property.value: Goulden Sam

property.name: description
property.value: King inquires about the [[party]]'s experience with the [[Knight]]. If [[Tenna]] is in the town, King accepts him as a jester.

property.name: description
property.value: Is expanding and rennovating his room with the help of the other [[Darkner]]s in search of buried treasure.

property.name: description
property.value: Makes squeaking noises when interacted with.

property.name: description
property.value: Is helping [[Lancer]] build "enrichment enclosures" for the other townsfolk.

property.name: page
property.value: Mr. Elegance

property.name: description
property.value: Is receiving enrichment from its surroundings.

property.name: description
property.value: is gathering greens as part of a "Life's Hack".

property.name: description
property.value: Is receiving enrichment from tamping the soil.

property.name: description
property.value: Is gathering worms from the ground. Secretly wishes to work for [[Rouxls Kaard]].

property.name: description
property.value: Is disguised as a lamp to impress [[Queen]].

property.name: page
property.value: Rouxls Kaard

property.name: description
property.value: Is drinking battery acid and enjoying her new room. She offers the [[party]] some acid, but [[Susie]] declines on their behalf.

property.name: description
property.value: Is engaging with a computer dating app.

property.name: description
property.value: Is engaging with a computer dating app.

property.name: page
property.value: Head Hathy

property.name: description
property.value: Is cleaning the streets from on top of the [[Electro-Dasher]].

property.name: description
property.value: Are part of a touring band that only does the touring.

property.name: description
property.value: Is disguised as a lamp to impress [[Tenna]]. He objects when Tenna insults his rear.

property.name: page
property.value: Rouxls Kaard

property.name: description
property.value: Compliments his new room but hopes for a permanent home to live in.

property.name: description
property.value: Expresses her love for [[Lanino]], but comments on [[Rouxls Kaard]] having caressed her hair.

property.name: description
property.value: Expresses his love for [[Elnina]], but comments on [[Rouxls Kaard]] having put his hand on his.

property.name: description
property.value: Shows [[Ralsei]] the hats he has racked, but states that he has lost Ralsei's original hat.

property.name: page
property.value: Royal Coat Rack

property.name: description
property.value: Lancer offers a Lancer Cookie if the [[party]] does not already have one.

property.name: page
property.value: Lancer Cookie

property.name: description
property.value: Top Chef offers to replenish the [[party]]'s Spin Cake if they do not already have one.

property.name: page
property.value: Spin Cake

property.name: description
property.value: Going into the light takes the [[party]] back to the School.
